entities.name: KOLAR DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Karnataka, India, used as the study region for analyzing land use changes and groundwater resources.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India where Kolar district is located.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on groundwater resources was conducted.

entities.name: LAND USE CHANGES
entities.description: The shift in land utilization from grass and rainfed crop lands to eucalyptus plantations and irrigated cultivation.

entities.name: GROUNDWATER RESOURCES
entities.description: The underground water available in the Kolar district, affected by land use and abstraction.

entities.name: WATER BALANCE MODEL
entities.description: A hydrological model calibrated and validated against groundwater level, recharge, and surface runoff.

entities.name: GROUNDWATER LEVEL
entities.description: A measurement used for the calibration and validation of the water balance model.

entities.name: RECHARGE
entities.description: The process of water infiltrating into the groundwater, which was reduced by eucalyptus plantations.

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: Water flowing over the land surface, which decreased due to eucalyptus plantations.

entities.name: GRASS
entities.description: A type of land cover that was replaced by eucalyptus plantations and irrigated cultivation.

entities.name: RAINFED CROP LANDS
entities.description: Agricultural lands relying on rainfall that were converted to other uses.

entities.name: EUCALYPTUS
entities.description: A tree species used in plantations that increases evapotranspiration and reduces groundwater recharge.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CULTIVATION
entities.description: Farming practice using artificial water supply, contributing to increased groundwater abstraction.

entities.name: EVAPOTRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water loss from soil and plants, increased by eucalyptus plantations.

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE DEFICIT
entities.description: A condition of water deficiency in the soil caused by high evapotranspiration.

entities.name: GROUNDWATER ABSTRACTION
entities.description: The process of extracting water from the ground, which increased due to expanded irrigated areas.

entities.name: WATER MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches developed to close the gap between water supply and demand.

entities.name: DEMAND-SUPPLY GAP
entities.description: The disparity between available freshwater and the water required for the district.
